name: Gemini 3 Code Explainer
description: Analyzes complex code snippets and provides detailed, structured explanations of logic, control flow, and potential optimizations.
preconditions: prompt contains a code snippet or references a code file
prompt asks for explanation or analysis
postconditions: output breaks down code into logical sections
output identifies time and space complexity where applicable
evidence_requirements: references specific line numbers or symbols from the input
provides at least one optimization suggestion

steps.text: Parse code structure and identify main algorithm
Draft section-by-section explanation with complexity analysis
Verify explanation accuracy against the source code
